headline: Devon Energy CEO Clay Gaspar to Participate in a Fireside Chat at the J.P. Morgan Energy, Power, Renewables & Mining Conference
summary: HOUSTON, June 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN) today announced Clay Gaspar, President and CEO will participate in a fireside chat at the J.P. Morgan Energy, Power, Renewables & Mining Conference. The fireside chat is scheduled for 8:45 a.m. Central time (9:45 a.m. Eastern time) on Tuesday, June 23, 2026 and will be webcast live on Devon’s website at www.devonenergy.com. A replay of the webcast will be available for 30 days following the event. ABOUT DEVON ENERGYDevon E

headline: Stocks Supported by Lower Crude Oil Prices and Bond Yields
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.11%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.57%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is down -0.18%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.09%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...
